prompt: Generate a realistic transcript in Standard Nigerian English. A customer calls a bus company (e.g., ABC Transport) to book an interstate ticket. The agent must be polite, check routes (Lagos to Abuja), availability, confirm price, and complete the booking (Booking Ref: ABC-XXXX). Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Nigerian Pidgin. A customer calls bus company to book ticket for interstate. The agent must be polite, check route (Lagos to Abuja), if space dey, confirm price, and book am (Booking Ref: ABC-XXXX). Include recording consent.
